title: Bam Margera Presents: Lost Boys Never Die!
original_title: Bam Margera Presents: The 69 Eyes - Lost Boys Never Die!
overview: The legendary Bam Margera (Viva La Bam, Jackass, etc) teams up with Producer Joe Frantz to to make a hit music video for the band The 69 Eyes. Appearances by stars such as such as Steve-O, Brandon Novak, and Chris Raab.
